title: Evolution of spider- and ant-eating habits in crab spiders (Araneae: Thomisidae)
author: Pekar, Stano
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Table S4.    List of specimens and sequences used in the present study. Labels: terminal names in trees; #genes: number of genes included for the terminal; XX_#accession: NCBI accession number for gene XX; XX_scientific_names: label used in the tree; date and country information for the specimens sequenced in the present study; sample code and DNA isolate: collection and DNA extraction code of the corresponding specimen; Comments: information on chimeric terminals.
